lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Ah... [player name], welcome. I would offer you some water, but we don't get much of it down here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks...

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I take it you have questions.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I do, but it is important that it is you who is asking for information, not me that is offering it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... How are you still communicating with your followers?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I take it you have answers.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I do, but I rarely share them umprompted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, how are you still communicating with your followers?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, a few of them actually. How are you still communicating with your followers?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Why, through my voice, of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know what I mean. How are you still communicating with your voice?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: The same way I always have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But the dark nullifier... I thought it was supposed to sever your connection.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Hmm... Yes, if anything could have done so, it would have been the power of the Dark Altar.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: However, when your opponents have only one angle of approach, it makes them so predictable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You knew we would try to use it?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Yes. When I heard you would be hand delivering me a connection to the Dark Altar... Why, I was overjoyed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But... I remember planting it! The plan went off without a hitch!

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I do not doubt that you remember it that way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you do?!

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: A simple transfiguration of the mind. My disciples granted you a memory of success. A fitting payment for your gratious service.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You modified my memory?! That's only the second time someone has done that to me, and I wasn't very happy about it then either!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You modified my memory?!

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Yes. And I have now answered five of your questions. I believe my generosity has been both demonstrated and exhausted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You call that gloating generosity? If you didn't want something from me, I wouldn't still be down here. Get to the point.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Hmm... Perhaps you are more astute than I thought. Very well, there is something that I want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well you won't be getting it from me!

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I am Yama. Every mortal desires something of mine. Ancient armaments? Hidden knowledge? Or perhaps a taste of revenge...

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: These things could be yours.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Face me in combat. If you win, you take it all. Armaments, knowledge, revenge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And if I lose?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I take your soul. For all of eternity.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I see. Perhaps we could lower the stakes then.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I will face you in an inhibited form. I'll even allow you to bring an ally, provided they have entered the same contract.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: If you win, I will give you a chance to gain some of my treasures, and of course, you will have sampled your revenge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And if I lose?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: When you take your final rest, I shall take your soul for a year. A drop in the ocean compared to eternity.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I know you'll keep your word?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: The same way I will know you shall keep yours. A binding contract. As luck would have it, I had one of my scribes draft one up for just such an occasion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...Okay.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Sign right here.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Excellent... Challenge me when you are ready, [player name]. I very much look forward to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure I want to...

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Of course. There is no rush. Leave, with your tail tucked between your legs. If you grow a spine and wish to fulfil your revenge, I will be waiting.

sections.title: After backing out from signing the contract

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: You are back. Excellent. I have little time for cowards. If you are ready, I will retrieve the contract.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Sign right here.

sections.title: Using the right-click Challenge option before being presented with the contract

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Ah... Yes, let us not get bogged down in the minutiae. Before we start, a quick contract. Nothing but a formality.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Sign right here.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Welcome, [player name]. Have you come to challenge me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. Let's do this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I have some questions.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's something in our contract about additional contracts... Why would I want to sign any more of them?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: As outlined in subsection C, if you wish for your revenge to feel more 'real', I am willing to lift some of the restrictions placed by the original contract.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why would I want that?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: You seem to enjoy self-imposed difficulty. I thought I would indulge you.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: You may not, in which case you can sell them to someone with greater respect for themselves. But if you do, the option is there.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: And if you manage to claim victory, there is of course a reward for each contract.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, can I see the contracts?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: No. For this, I require from you a service. My demons are... Lacking, of late. Unrefined.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: They must fight, suffer and reform. If you deliver them specific ends during your 'tasks' in my domain, they may leave behind a contract.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: And of course, if you defeat me, I may also reward you with one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kinds of 'ends'?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Death by two-handed melee weapons, heavy ranged weapons, magic spells, special attacks, and defeating them whilst bound. Each kind may award a different contract.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: If you find yourself eager to obtain any contract, I will use a glyph to indicate my preferred method, which you can utilise for a better chance to receive that contract.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kinds of contracts can I obtain?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Were you more adept at reading you would find the details in our original contract. Otherwise, bring any you obtain to me and I shall explain then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you keep any record of our fights?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I do, I can have somebody retrieve your file. One moment.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: For your reading pleasure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'd rather not.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I see. Perhaps you are just here to waste my time then? Return when you are not.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Your strike lacks bite.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: A change of pace.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Colabi, infernus

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Ven, estella infernus

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Colabesur infernus

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Ven, umbra eclipta

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Umbra, proriumpse

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Umbra apprerendehe

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Begone

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: You bore me.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Enough.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Lacking.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Pathetic.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: The price is paid.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Another day, perhaps.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Another day, another soul.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Your soul was always mine.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Fair is fair.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Your reward, as agreed.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: A satisfying warmup. Collect your loot and let us continue.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: A passing performance.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: A close fight. Your nerve was well held.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: A good risk, adequately rewarded.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Excellent performance. Again?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Effective, if a bit cowardly.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Risk averse, are we?

sections.title: Attempting to pick up another player's dropped item during a solo-only contract

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Missed the fine print, did we? Our contract forbids you from picking up stashed items.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I hope you are finding the spoils from my treasury to your liking. There are plenty more for you to claim.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Your victories mount. You are getting better at this.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: A victory earned. But there is room for improvement, is there not?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Here we go again. I suppose it is entertaining watching you desperately guzzle potions, at the very least.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I must once again commend your strategy. Employing tactics so boring that they put your opponents to sleep is very novel.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Back again I see. I can see how you find these bouts exhilarating, being such a feeble opponent.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Your willingness to wager your soul continues to surprise. I suppose you think of it even less worth than I do.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Honestly, I expected more. That it takes you as long as it does to defeat my inhibited form is rather embarrassing.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: You look happy with yourself. How endearing.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: You return once more. Excellent.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Ah, you have returned. Your competence matches only your greed.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: In any case, [player name], are you here to challenge me?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Don't let a single defeat set you back. You could have so many more.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: My treasury remains over capacity. And here I was hoping to be relieved of some of its contents.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: What a shame for our last bout to have ended that way! Maybe you will do better next time.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Back after being defeated so quickly? I suppose what you lack in skill you make up for with perseverance.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Some losses are unavoidable. Yours, of course, was not.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Your donation is greatly appreciated.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Defeat finds you. Of course, that is hardly unexpected.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: If you are struggling to achieve victory, I suppose avoiding defeat is the best you can do.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: You must be tired, having to run all the way back here.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Back for more? Well, you can always escape again I suppose.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Excellent work evading. Next time, try fighting back.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Our last bout was cut short. Perhaps the next will be more fruitful.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Back again? Watching you escape in such a hurry, I thought you might never return.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Ah, I see your legs have stopped quivering. Perhaps next time you will fight to the end.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I hear adventurers like to boast about their feats. I wonder if people realise how readily they run at the first sight of risk.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: A well executed retreat. You must be very practiced.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: There is no shame in defeat. There is plenty to be found in your cowardice, however.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: After all the confidence you demonstrated... still you lost your nerve. Perhaps I should have included in our contract a clause to cover your cowardly retreats.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: In any case, [player name], have you come to challenge me?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Why... Do my eyes deceive me? I see a glimmer of courage within you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've seen what you have to offer. It doesn't scare me.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Excellent! let us sign the contract and find out how long that feeling lasts.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: The terms of this contract dictate that you are to make your choice of oathplate to receive known prior to the fight. Sign it here.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I may have forgotten to feed my kitten...

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: That's all it took? A vague threat to match your bravado? Get out of my sight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know what I'm doing, sign the contract.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: With pleasure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thought, I think I'll hold off.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Do not make a habit of wasting my time like this. Get out of my sight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to know more about this contract.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Signing these contracts agrees us to a duel in which I am less inhibited. My powers will be greater than what you have experienced before.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Each one details unique rules and rewards, the details of which you can read on the contract itself.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: But I'm sure you already have. Shall we?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I think I'd like to read over the terms again.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Very well. Return when you are ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... No, I thought you'd lost this.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: No, that contract was allowed to come into your possession quite deliberately. And I see you have bravely decided to make use of it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure I...

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I see that I had misjudged you, [player name]. Let us sign the contract and cement that assessment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I think it might have been somebody else that dropped it. I should really go and find them...

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Yes, perhaps it was. Perhaps it belonged to somebody else. Somebody with a semblance of pride or self respect.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: If you find them, be sure to send them my way.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Ah... The humble plain pizza. Unremarkable, yet powerful. Hand me it.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Yes... Delicious.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: You think you can deny me pizza? Double check the fine print of our contract, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?! You can't just take my pizza!

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Oh but I can. As per our contract, any pizza you present to me cannot be taken back. Right here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's outrageous! You can't hold me to this!

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Perhaps you should have expressed that opinion before signing. Indeed, perhaps if you felt that way you should not have signed at all.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: The meat pizza. An adequate if uninspired offering. Hand me it.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Anchovy pizza. Flavourful and bold. Hand me it.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Pineapple pizza, topped with delicious acidic flavours and the angry tears of a thousand nay-sayers. Excellent. Hand me it.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Yes... Delicious.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that your favourite kind of pizza?

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: No. My favourite kind of pizza is the jalapeño pizza. Were it that I could enjoy its zesty heat for every meal.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: My my, that's a lot of goods your dealing with. What are your terms?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for a fight, show me how much these are worth to you.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Hmm. No reward, but purely action? I could be convinced.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know what I'm doing, sign the contract.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: With pleasure.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thought, I think I'll hold off.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Do not make a habit of wasting my time like this. Get out of my sight.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Do not insult me. I will not eat your leftovers.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Do you think you are funny, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not at all, Yama. Here, take it.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I'm quite alright. You can keep the evidence of your lackluster cooking ability to yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't. As per our contract, once shown to you, a full pizza cannot be taken back.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Do not test me, [player name]. I will not be eating burnt pizza today.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do whatever you like with it, but I cannot take it back.

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: Very clever. Now get out of my sight.

sections.title: Walking away after showing Yama a pizza

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: You think you can deny me pizza? Double check the fine print of our contract, [player name].

sections.title: Teleporting or dying after showing Yama a pizza

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: You thought you could escape with your pizza? I'm afraid not, [player name].

lines.speaker: Yama
lines.text: I'm afraid my scribes are a tad overwhelmed at the moment. Please, return with your contract soon, I would be delighted to sign once they are unblocked.
